title: The Country Nears Collapse
description: Pages 16–18 focus on the country nears collapse, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: Fufufu sounds like you're trying to say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "If I'm to eliminate you, now's the time"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No need to be hasty.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We can remain friendly for now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm protecting your country, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: From now on, no matter how roughly this land is laid bare...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am still blind... I won't see it, so fear not.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Reverie is this year.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: like it or not, this world will shift...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: This is Corrida Colosseum's fighting tour- Nament's...!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Final match!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I made it in time.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: At the center of the whole country's attention!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The strug- gle for that treasure of a prize will go down in this newly-pre- pared ring!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: All that's left is for the five fighters to make their appearance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hehh- EHHE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is gonna be fun!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Okay, let's go, Marin- Coloseeo.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: It's Barto- Lomeo!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Where'd ya come up with that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: The first to appear is...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Here he is! This tournament's soldier of Fortune!!! Our very own...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: I hope you're watching!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Lucy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: ACE!!!

summary: The Country Nears Collapse focuses on Doflamingo, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as as the battle spreads, Fujitora, the Marines, and the Donquixote Family weigh their next moves in a collapsing Dressrosa.
